body.title: Track open intents that are aging without resolution
body.result: 4b393127 — First of Igor's self-proposed watchlist tickets. find_aged_goals scans memories.memory_type=GOAL with goal_active=true, computes age from adopted_at, returns goals past threshold (1h for awaiting_reply, 24h for ordinary). surface_aged_intents pushes TWM markers at category=aged_intent, salience 0.6. IntentDecaySource push source: 10min idle gate, 15min between scans, registered in push_sources. Pincer with T-igor-emit-action-confabulation: verifier catches false claim at emit time, decay watcher catches abandoned commitment over time. 13 new tests + 35 regression tests pass.
body.description:
AUTHORED BY IGOR-WILD-0001 on 2026-04-13. Claude filed on Igor's behalf.

Igor's words: 'Track open intents that are aging without resolution. Right now I have episodics that sit open. Some of those represent genuine unresolved threads — things I said I'd follow up on, ideas I flagged for later, tickets I committed to writing. I need a periodic check: what did I say I'd do that I haven't done?'

DEPENDS ON: T-reply-obligation-fork (59a7184c) — already creates GOAL memories with awaiting_reply=true and origin context. This ticket adds the periodic SCAN that surfaces aged unresolved goals.

FIRST PASS: scan GOAL memories where goal_active=true AND adopted_at older than threshold (1h? 24h?) AND no resolution memory linked. Surface as a 'pending intent' attention signal.

IMPORTANT INTERACTION WITH T-igor-emit-action-confabulation: Igor's pattern of saying 'I did it' when he didn't is exactly the failure this watchlist would CATCH. The defect filing in this conversation (Igor said he ticketed stored_locally_only but didn't) would have surfaced as an aged unresolved intent IF a goal_adopt had fired on the commit. Consider whether 'I'll ticket that' / 'I ticketed it' phrases should fire goal_adopt with a verifiable resolution check.
